installCommand: npm exec -- pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const d=p.join('node_modules','@swc','helpers','_');if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(p.join('node_modules','@swc','helpers')).filter(f=>f.startsWith('_')&&f!=='_').forEach(f=>{const t=p.join(d,f);if(!fs.existsSync(t)){fs.mkdirSync(t,{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.join(t,'package.json'),JSON.stringify({main:'../../esm/'+f+'.js'}))}})"
buildCommand: npm exec -- pnpm --filter web build && rm -rf .next && cp -R apps/web/.next .next
